title: Kalyana Parisu
actors: Saroja Devi B., K.A. Thangavelu, M. Saroja
plot: Kalyana Parisu, director C.V.Sridhar's debut film, deals with triangle love, two women vying for the same man. The film enjoyed huge box-office popularity. Gemini Ganesh is a bachelor, who had to leave his college before finishing...
